subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Render praise unto the Beloved of the world, that thou hast truly turned towards Him in these days when the divines and mystics [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حمد کن محبوب عالم را که بحق اقبال نمودی در ایامیکه علما و عرفا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer, @rejection, opposition and persecution
